prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为170、76、86、74、98名，整体波动较大，2021年因选科分组（首选物理再选化学）位次较宽松，2022–2024年稳定在74–86名 区间，2025年小幅后移至98名，近两年呈轻微后移趋势；2021–2024年物理类计划稳定在25–26人，2025年增至30人，2026年进一步扩至35人，较2025年扩 招约16.7%，扩招幅度较大，有利于降低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第2名，属全国顶尖学府，对高分考生吸 引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及校园安全、食堂宿舍等舆情事件，但抖音热度排名第3（高热），短视频平台曝光量极高，整体报考关注度仍处高位；2 025年湖北提前批曾出现招生空档，但属个别现象；北京大学拥有数十个A+学科，涵盖数学、物理学、化学、生物学、计算机科学与技术、法学、经济学、中国 语言文学、哲学、社会学等，学科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类持续高热推荐，法学、临床医学为推荐偏热，与北 大优势学科方向一致，相关专业报考热度不减；湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年增长8.4%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；省控线（本科批）2025年为405分，近年呈下 降趋势；北京大学位于北京，属跨省报考，湖南考生对顶尖名校的地域偏好不明显，学校层次为主要考量因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次98名、20 26年扩招约16.7%（使位次后移）、物理类考生增加8.4%（使位次前移）以及学校顶尖声誉与高热关注度，扩招效应略大于考生增加效应，预计2026年最低录取位次约103名，区间 53–153名。

- 数学类
- 理科试验班类（元培）
- 电子信息类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约103名，区间53–153名。位次在区间下限（53名以内）可重点冲刺一档计算机类、数学类、元培等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（80–120名）以二档为主、一档为辅；位 次在区间上限（120–153名）建议二档保底、三档稳妥。北大各专业学科评估均为顶尖水平，整体报考难度极高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were 170, 76, 86, 74, and 98 respectively, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2021, due to subject grouping (first choice physics, second choice chemistry), the ranking was relatively loose. From 2022 to 2024, it stabilized in the range of 74–86, and in 2025, it slightly shifted back to 98, indicating a mild backward trend in recent two years. From 2021 to 2024, the enrollment plan for the Physics Category was stable at 25–26 students, increasing to 30 in 2025, and further expanding to 35 in 2026, an increase of about 16.7% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and conducive to lowering the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 2nd in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings for many years, making it a top-tier institution in China with strong appeal to high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving campus safety, cafeteria, and dormitory incidents, but its Douyin popularity ranks 3rd (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, so overall application attention remains high. In 2025, there was a vacancy in the early admission batch in Hubei, but this is an isolated case. Peking University has dozens of A+ disciplines, including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science and Technology, Law, Economics, Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, Sociology, etc., with top-tier academic strength nationwide, highly matching the admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication majors continue to be highly recommended, while Law and Clinical Medicine are recommended as moderately popular, consistent with Peking University's advantageous disciplines, and the application heat for related majors remains high. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of 8.4% compared to 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 405 points in 2025, showing a downward trend in recent years. Peking University is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application, and Hunan examinees have no obvious regional preference for top prestigious schools, with the university level being the main consideration.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 98, the approximately 16.7% enrollment expansion in 2026 (which shifts the ranking backward), the 8.4% increase in Physics Category examinees (which shifts the ranking forward), and the university's top reputation and high attention, the expansion effect is slightly greater than the examinee increase effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be about 103, with a range of 53–153.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Mathematics
- Science Experimental Class (Yuanpei)
- Electronic Information.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Cultural Heritage Conservation Technology (Ancient Architecture).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 103, range 53–153. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 53) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science, Mathematics, and Yuanpei. Those in the middle of the range (80–120) should prioritize Tier 2 majors with Tier 1 as a supplement. Those at the upper end (120–153) are advised to use Tier 2 as a safety and Tier 3 for stability. All majors at Peking University are top-tier in discipline evaluations, making overall admission extremely difficult.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, the minimum ranking for History Category was shown as 0; in 2024, the minimum ranking was 51. For 2025 History Category admissions, the latest benchmark ranking cannot be obtained, so the 2024 ranking of 51 is used as the most recent reference. From 2021 to 2022, the History Category planned to enroll 26 students; in 2023, 24; in 2024, it significantly increased to 31; in 2026, the plan is 25 students, a reduction of approximately 19.4% compared to 2024, indicating a clear tightening of enrollment quotas.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 2nd nationally by Soft Science, making it a top comprehensive university with leading liberal arts strength. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving campus safety and other public opinion. It ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with overall extremely high attention. In 2025, there was a vacancy in the Hubei early batch admissions, but this is an isolated incident. Peking University's liberal arts advantages are prominent, with Chinese Language and Literature A+, Philosophy A+, Law A+, Sociology A+, Archaeology A+, Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, etc., highly matching the History Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has a relatively hot social recommendation; Economics categories are divided with a wait-and-see attitude; Journalism and Communication categories are clearly discouraged. In 2026, Hunan Province has approximately 187,000 History Category examinees, a sharp increase of 31.2% compared to 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) in 2025 was 446 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Peking University is located in Beijing, a cross-province application, and high-scoring History Category candidates in Hunan have no regional restrictions on their willingness to apply to top prestigious schools.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2024 benchmark ranking of 51, the 2026 enrollment reduction of approximately 19.4% (which moves the ranking forward), and the 31.2% surge in History Category examinees (which also moves the ranking forward), competition is significantly intensified under dual pressure. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be approximately 42, with a range of 1 to 92.
